mnemonic: E F E R C E
explanation: E = Equality (14-18), F = Freedom (19-22), E = Exploitation (23-24), R = Religion (25-28), C = Cultural/Edu (29-30), E = Enforcement/Remedies (32).
Religion, Race, Caste, Sex, Place of birth. (Note: 'Residence' is NOT included in Art 15, but is in Art 16 for employment).

mnemonic: S A A M R P
explanation: Speech, Assembly, Association, Movement, Residence, Profession.
Minto-Morley was 1909 (Shorter name, earlier year). Montagu-Chelmsford was 1919 (Longer name, later year).
